summary: Skill can be imported with Prometheus compatibility metadata, but some guidance should be reviewed.

findings.message: Contains package install or remote execution guidance that should be reviewed.
findings.excerpt: t-br`, `ja`, `zh`. Non-English phonemization requires `espeak-ng` system-wide (`brew install espeak-ng` / `apt-get install espeak-ng`). ### Speed - `0.7-0.8` — tutorial, complex content, accessibility - `1.0` — natural pace (default) - `1.1-1.2` — intros, tr

findings.message: Skill has no trigger phrases, which can make automatic discovery unreliable.
findings.suggestedChange: Add concise task phrases to triggers.

findings.message: Contains package install or remote execution guidance that should be reviewed.
findings.suggestedChange: Review this instruction before relying on the skill.

proposedPatches.description: Add a Prometheus compatibility overlay with normalized metadata, permissions, requirements, lifecycle, and resources.

manifest.name: hyperframes-media
manifest.description: Asset preprocessing for HyperFrames compositions — text-to-speech narration (Kokoro), audio/video transcription (Whisper), and background removal for transparent overlays (u2net). Use when generating voiceover from text, transcribing speech for captions, removing the background from a video or image to use as a transparent overlay, choosing a TTS voice or whisper model, or chaining these (TTS → transcribe → captions). Each command downloads its own model on first run.

proposedPatches.description: missing-triggers: Add concise task phrases to triggers.
safety-unreviewed-background-install: Review this instruction before relying on the skill.

Use when generating voiceover from text, transcribing speech for captions, removing the background from a video or image to use as a transparent overlay, choosing a TTS voice or whisper model, or chaining these (TTS → transcribe → captions).
